title: Lavender Bags : 20 Dried Lavender Flowers Bags as Natural Air Freshener and Moth Repellent for Wardrobes – Wardrobe Fresheners – Car Freshener – Room Air Freshener – Lavender Sachets by Inovida
features: 🌿 LAVENDER SCENTED SACHETS : Dried flowers from pure, dried lavender plants in 20 purple organza bags. They're ideal as room freshener, bathroom air freshener, wardrobe fragrance or car air freshener

🌿 DRIED LAVENDER FLOWERS : 100% naturally and gently dried flowers, hand-picked with care. We use naturally pure, intensely scented flowers for each lavender pillow – making it a great small gift idea
🌿 LAVENDER PILLOWS FOR SLEEPING : Lavender has always been considered a soothing bedroom scent. Fabric sachets for lavender are very popular when falling asleep. Ideal for placing on a bedside table!
🌿 MOTH REPELLENT FOR WARDROBES AND DRAWERS : A gentle alternative to moth balls for moth protection! Keep moths away with the scent of lavender. It protects against larvae infestation and moth damage
🌿 VERSATILE : The dry lavender flower provides a pleasant lavender scent. Use the scented sachet for sleeping, for children's rooms, home fragrance or as drawer fresheners for a wardrobe with drawers
description: Product Description 20 FILLED LAVENDER BLOSSOM SACHETS — FROM INOVIDA. FOR A PLEASANT ATMOSPHERE Genuine, gently dried lavender (Lavandula angustifolia) in 20 purple-coloured organza sachets. Lavender sachets are traditionally popular for falling asleep and provide a wonderfully calming , pleasant lavender scent in bedrooms and children's rooms. We recommend lightly kneading the lavender bag before sleeping and placing it on the bedside table beside the bed. GENTLY DRIED LAVENDER BLOSSOMS The flowers are gently dried before we fill them into the scented sachets. For the lavender cushions, we use naturally pure, intensely scented lavender flowers in blue. The dried lavender flowers are suitable as a special gift in our beautiful box. They can also be used as a wardrobe fragrance , a natural air freshener for the car , or a bed frame—and are versatile . NATURAL MOTH PROTECTION Moths naturally find the scent of lavender unpleasant. This is why lavender sachets are often used as natural moth protection for textiles, drawers, kitchens and wardrobes. TIP: We recommend gently kneading the sachets occasionally to renew the fragrance. PREMIUM QUALITY For natural wardrobe fragrance and moth protection, discover als our aromatic cedar wood planks ! Presented in a beautiful box, they are perfect as a gift . They work as a closet fragrance, natural air freshener for your nightstand or under-bed storage, and have many versatile uses . 30 Cedar Wood Flowers 16 Cedar Wood Planks 30 Yellow Sticky Traps Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 1,504 4.2 out of 5 stars 491 4.0 out of 5 stars 569 Price £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 Natural Fragrance and Protection: Cedar wood rings for clothes hangers are a great addition to lavender bags! 100% natural cedarwood blocks for your storage, wardrobe or drawers. Yellow sticky traps for indoor plants help reduce manifestation of fungus gnats.
